description: Machine-readable governance rules. This is the single source of truth for safety limits and operational policy. config.py loads from this file at runtime.

safety_limits.notes: Agents can adjust these ONLY on explicit user command. Hard caps in config.py are fallbacks.

main.notes: All user operations use this account

robot.min_portfolio_rationale: A 15% price move on $5 = $0.75 trade. Costs: ~$0.30 EVM + gas + 0.3% LP fee. Below $5, costs exceed rebalance benefit.
robot.notes: Power Law rebalancer daemon. Currently unfunded — do NOT suggest rebalancing until funded with at least $5 in USDC + WBTC.

robot_deprecated.notes: Old robot with shared parent key. Kept as backup. Never delete.

routing.whbar_policy: internal_routing_only — never show to users, never suggest wrapping/unwrapping
routing.blacklist_notes: HBAR<->WBTC direct pool is broken/low liquidity. Route via USDC hub. NEVER modify the blacklist.

fiat_onramp.notes: If user has swappable tokens worth >= $1, suggest swapping first. Only show MoonPay as primary when wallet is nearly empty.

agent_rules.simulation_policy: NEVER simulate. We trade live. Simulation hides bugs and creates dysfunction.
agent_rules.transfer_policy: Wallet whitelists are the most important safety feature. All transfers require whitelisted destination. Token and pool whitelists are operational, not safety-critical.
